summary: Add MetaKBReader module to opencode-learning-engine. Fail-open reader that loads meta-knowledge-index.json into memory, queries by affected_path and task_type with 200-token output cap. 12 tests covering load/query/isStale/truncation.
root_cause: No programmatic way to consume the meta-knowledge index from within the learning engine. OrchestrationAdvisor needs a reader module to query relevant anti-patterns, suggestions, and conventions for task context.
fix_approach: Created MetaKBReader class (CommonJS) with load(), query(), isStale() methods. Query matches files against by_affected_path, anti-patterns by keyword overlap, conventions by path proximity. Output truncated to 800 chars (~200 tokens). All operations fail-open.

validation.notes: 12 tests pass via node --test. bun test exit code 0.
